findings.location: s1 — 2)-2 Actionクラスの実装 code block, comment ①
findings.description: The comment for step ① in the final doRW11ACXX04 code block was changed from the source. Source reads `// 【説明】①精査処理の呼び出し実装`; knowledge file reads `// ①前画面パラメータ（ユーザID・漢字氏名・カナ氏名）の単項目精査`. The replacement text was drawn from the preceding prose description, not from the actual source code comment.
findings.source_evidence: Source code comment: `// 【説明】①精査処理の呼び出し実装`

findings.description: The test class name `W11ACXXActionRequestTest` is a PascalCase class referenced in both 1)-1 and 2)-1 steps but is absent from the hints array.
